title: Sam Brumbaugh’s Website
text: I’m a college football player, pilot, and big fan of stock car racing. I am a sophomore at St. Olaf and am Majoring in Statistics and Data Science. I have a private pilots license and am working on my instrument rating. I play offensive tackle in football. My favorite NASCAR driver is Kyle Larson. My favorite movie is Smokey and the Bandit (1977), I recommend you watch it “you sumbitch”.
